questionHtml: Using an international trade diagram, explain the likely impact of Japan “removing the current 30 % tariff” on the level of cheddar cheese imports. (paragraph [4]).
markschemeHtml:
Candidates who incorrectly label diagrams can be awarded a maximum of [3].

The use of price and quantity for the axes is sufficient. The domestic supply curve may be labelled as Sdomestic or Sd or just S and the European supply curve may be labelled SEurope, SEU, or Sworld, or Sw.
A title is not necessary.

meta.title: Using an international trade diagram, explain the likely impact of Japan “removing the current 30 % tariff” on the level of cheddar cheese imports. (paragraph [4]).
